name: stupid-ai
description: stupid-ai — a marketplace for Human-Plan-driven Claude Code workflows. We trust LLMs less than we trust a written plan a human can read.

plugins.name: human-plan
plugins.description: A Human Plan gated AI development workflow: align requirements, check architecture and design, approve before code, audit after implementation, with code-scan / batch-code-scan / arch-check for project health.

plugins.name: human-prompt
plugins.description: A standalone prompt-alignment loop: align, realign, confirm, and approve a short human request into an execution prompt.
